toralPoem:
Amari laadki Toral, aankh no taaro amari,
 Nanpan thi j rahi chhe, khushiyo ni chaandani amari.

 Tena darek haasya maa, amaru jagat vase chhe,
 Tena darek swapna maa, amaru aashirvaad rahyu chhe.

 Saadgi maa sundarta, hriday maa nikhals prem,
 Hasmukho swabhaav evo, ke door thai darek pal no ver-zher.

 Nishchint bani jeeve jeevan, darek pal ne maane,
 Sauna dil maa sthan banaavi, prem na diva pragtaave.

 Parivaar maate samarpit, laganiyo thi bharelu man,
 Dansheelata teni evi, ke khushi vaheche darek kshan.

 Samajdari ane aabhaar bhaav thi, jeevan ne sveekari le,
 Darek paristhiti maa smit saathe, aagal vadhti rahe.

 Aaje e kshan aavi, jyare nava gher paglu bhare,
 Amara hriday maa lagani saathe, khushi thi ene vidaay kariye.

 Shaant ane sanskaari Jay saathe, have e jeevan no maarg vaheche,
 Tena saath maa prem, samjan ane vishvaas sadaay vadhe.

 Banne nu jeevan rahe sukhmay, prem thi bharelu har pal,
 Ishwar aashirvaad raakhe sada, khushiyo thi khile temnu darek kal.

 Amari Toral ane Jay nu jeevan rahe
 aanand thi bharpoor, Sadaakaal maate vishesh.
✨
